overall.description: Static cinematic shot of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game (likely Hogwarts Legacy), showing students seated at long wooden house tables beneath hundreds of floating magical candles in a grand gothic stone hall with vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles and long house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the great hall and students dining at the house tables from the center aisle

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at the left house table eating and conversing
students in dark robes seated at the right house table dining and socializing

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended by magic throughout the ceiling providing warm illumination
long wooden table with white tablecloth at the center of the hall facing the camera
long wooden benches and tables running the length of the left side seating students
long wooden benches and tables running the length of the right side seating students
tall gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the left wall
tall gothic stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the right wall
tall arched stained glass windows with stone tracery on the left wall
tall arched stained glass windows with stone tracery on the right wall
high vaulted stone ceiling with ribbed arches extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the Great Hall's interior, showcasing the magical floating candles illuminating the gothic stone architecture. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden house tables on both sides, dining and conversing, while the camera maintains a steady perspective from the center aisle looking toward the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic gaze into the heart of the Great Hall, capturing the timeless atmosphere of a magical dining space. It begins with a stationary perspective from the center aisle, where the camera looks toward the far end of the gothic stone architecture. As the view settles, the focus emphasizes the hundreds of floating candles that cast a warm, flickering glow over the vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows. The scene remains poised, observing students in dark robes as they dine and converse at the long wooden house tables lining both sides of the hall.
